name: toxo
description: Task management and personal finance desktop application
author: TheOverforge

scripts.dev: concurrently -n main,renderer -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev:main" "npm run dev:renderer"
scripts.build: npm -w renderer run build && npm -w preload run build && npm -w main run build
scripts.dev:app: concurrently -n vite,electron -c cyan,green --kill-others "npm run dev:renderer" "node scripts/start-electron.js"
